userTokenId.description: The unique identifier of the newly created user token.

userToken.description: The generated user token secret. Only available at creation time.

userTokenName.description: The user-defined name for the user token.

clientId.description: The OAuth client identifier associated with the user token.

ipsWhitelist.description: The set of whitelisted IP addresses authorized to use this token.

scopeIds.description: [DEPRECATED — use scopeNames instead] The set of permission scope identifiers granted to this token. Available scopes: 200 = etoro-public:real:read, 201 = etoro-public:demo:read, 202 = etoro-public:real:write, 203 = etoro-public:demo:write.

scopeNames.description: The set of permission scope names (preferred; replaces the deprecated scopeIds). Provide either scopeNames or scopeIds. Available scopes: etoro-public:real:read, etoro-public:demo:read, etoro-public:real:write, etoro-public:demo:write.

expiresAt.description: The expiration date and time of the user token in UTC.
